headline: Elijah Upson
body: 🚨🔴⚪️ Elijah Upson to Arsenal, here we go! Agreement signed today for 18 year old centre back to join Gunners project. Upson turned down new contract at Spurs to join AFC for long term, all set to be announced.
raw_text:
🚨🔴⚪️ Elijah Upson to Arsenal, here we go! Agreement signed today for 18 year old centre back to join Gunners project.

Upson turned down new contract at Spurs to join #AFC for long term, all set to be announced.
text:
🚨🔴⚪️ Elijah Upson to Arsenal, here we go! Agreement signed today for 18 year old centre back to join Gunners project.

Upson turned down new contract at Spurs to join #AFC for long term, all set to be announced.
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- ELIJAH UPSON CONFIRMED PERMANENT TRANSFER FROM TOTTENHAM TO ARSENAL.
💰 FEE — Undisclosed fee
📝 CONTRACT — Contract length undisclosed

#Arsenal #THFC #TransferNews #PremierLeague
